about.title: About me
about.p1: I'm Yanela, a Cuban photographer based in Belarus. I photograph women the way they want to see themselves — natural, confident and beautiful.
about.p2: I work with women's sessions, couples and families. Every shoot is a story we create together.

items.question: How much does a session cost?
items.answer: Prices are listed under Services. Cost depends on session type and duration.

items.question: How do I book?
items.answer: Message me on Instagram or Viber — we'll discuss date, location and format.

items.question: How long until I receive my photos?
items.answer: Between 7 and 10 days depending on the package. We'll agree on timing upfront.

items.question: What should I bring?
items.answer: 1–2 outfit options and comfortable shoes. Makeup is optional — I can recommend a MUA.

items.question: Where do sessions take place?
items.answer: Studio, urban locations or nature across Belarus. We'll choose together.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Write to me — let's plan your session
